title: Russian Beetroot Salad
description: A classic Russian-inspired beetroot salad recipe, made with beets, carrots, and a hint of dill.
instructions: Peel and grate the beetroot and carrot.
Chop the onion finely and separate the beetroot and carrot mixture.
Mix the chopped onion with the beetroot and carrot mixture.
Add the chopped fresh dill to the mixture and stir well.
In a separate bowl, mix the mayonnaise and sour cream.
Combine the mayonnaise mixture with the beetroot mixture and stir well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the salad and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
